---
title: "Team"
toc: false
---

## CO-LUMINATE Core Team

The CO-LUMINATE proposal team combines expertise in global mental health, biostatistics, epidemiology, and population science.

| Name | Role | Affiliation(s) | Primary Expertise |
|---|---|---|---|
| Xanthe Hunt | Lead Applicant | AHRI; Stellenbosch University; SAMRC | Global mental health, co-creation, youth engagement |
| Nondumiso Mthiyane | Co-applicant 1 | AHRI | Biostatistics |
| Collins C Iwuji | Co-applicant 2 | AHRI; Brighton and Sussex Medical School, University of Sussex | Global health, HIV medicine, clinical epidemiology |
| Kathy Baisley | Co-applicant 3 | AHRI; London School of Hygiene and Tropical Medicine | Medical statistics and epidemiology |
| Kobus Herbst | Co-applicant 4 | AHRI; SAPRIN | Population science and longitudinal data systems |

## Co-Creation And Community Input

- Youth Co-Creators (YCC): 11 young people provide thought leadership and contextual interpretation.
- Community Advisory Board: supports community engagement, relevance, and acceptability.
- Stakeholder engagement: input from government and civil-society partners for interpretation and uptake.

## Institutional Partners

- Africa Health Research Institute (AHRI)
- APHRC
- Wellcome Trust
